$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for the over-engineering review lens (Story 18.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; a structured delete-list of over-built code; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: OverEngineeringLensResponse
description: Structured delete-list returned by the over-engineering review lens for one story's diff.

summary.description: One-paragraph summary; says so explicitly when the diff is already minimal.

findings.description: Zero or more over-engineering findings. An empty list means the diff is already lean.

category.description: Kind of over-engineering: speculative abstraction, unused param/branch, hand-rolled code a stdlib/dep/one-liner covers, premature generality, or other.

file.description: Path of the file the finding refers to.

line.description: Line number, or null when the finding is file-level.

reason.description: One-line 'why' — what to delete and what makes it over-built.
